name: backend-types
description: Define IBackend interface and capability types for pluggable execution strategies
acceptanceCriteria: IBackend interface with execute<T>(ast, collection, options?) method
IBackend interface with capabilities property returning BackendCapabilities
BackendCapabilities type declares supported operators and features
QueryOptions type with orderBy, skip, take, include fields
QueryResult<T> type with items, totalCount (optional), hasMore (optional)
OrderByClause type with field and direction (asc/desc)
